mapper.sql: id, payment_no, account_id, appointment_id, amount, status, pay_method, pay_time, expire_time, refund_amount, refund_time, refund_reason, gmt_create, gmt_modified
mapper.insert: insert into payment_order (id, payment_no, account_id, appointment_id, amount, status, pay_method, pay_time, expire_time, refund_amount, refund_time, refund_reason, gmt_create, gmt_modified) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appointmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{refundTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{refundReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into payment_order
id, payment_no, account_id, appointment_id, amount, status, pay_method, pay_time, expire_time, refund_amount, refund_time, refund_reason, gmt_create, gmt_modified,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appointmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{refundTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{refundReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update payment_order set payment_no = #{paymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, appointment_id = #{appointmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pay_method = #{payMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pay_time = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, refund_time = #{refundTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, refund_reason = #{refundReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
